note: Pre-shared access codes, one per HOST country, required when proposing a new deal for that country (see .github/workflows/deal-config-submit.yml). This proves the submitter actually represents that country, rather than letting anyone propose deals in someone else's name. Codes are set here by the tool admin and shared privately with that country's representative, out-of-band (the same way the initial deal password itself would be shared). This is a SEPARATE concept from a deal's own `password` field in deal_config.json, which only gates *viewing* that one deal's logged data on the dashboard — a country may reuse the same string for both if they want one thing to remember, but they protect different actions (proposing deals vs. viewing a deal's numbers). Add a country by adding one entry here — no code changes required.
